metadata.title: Daniela Ayelén Argüello - Digital Communication & Marketing Strategist
metadata.description: Passionate about digital communication, social media strategy, and content creation. Specializing in building digital communities and developing comprehensive marketing strategies.

hero.name: Daniela Ayelén Argüello
hero.description: Passionate about digital communication, social media strategy, and content creation. I specialize in building digital communities, developing comprehensive marketing strategies, and creating engaging content that drives results across multiple platforms.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Passionate Digital Communicator
about.description1: With over 10 years of experience in digital communication and marketing, I've helped numerous brands establish their online presence and connect with their audiences authentically.
about.description2: My journey in digital communication began with a passion for storytelling and evolved into expertise in social media strategy, content creation, and brand development. I believe in the power of authentic communication to build lasting relationships between brands and their communities.
about.description3: When I'm not crafting digital strategies, you'll find me exploring new creative outlets, staying updated with the latest digital trends, or sharing knowledge with fellow professionals in the field.

digitalStrategist.title: Digital Communication Strategist
digitalStrategist.description: Leading comprehensive digital communication strategies for various brands and organizations.
achievements: Developed and executed social media strategies increasing engagement by 150%
Created content calendars and managed multi-platform campaigns
Provided consulting services for digital transformation initiatives

socialMediaManager.title: Social Media Manager
socialMediaManager.description: Managed social media accounts for multiple clients across different industries.
achievements: Grew client social media following by average of 200%
Implemented data-driven strategies to optimize content performance
Coordinated with creative teams to produce engaging multimedia content

contentCreator.title: Content Creator
contentCreator.description: Created compelling content for digital platforms and marketing campaigns.
achievements: Produced viral content reaching millions of impressions
Developed brand voice guidelines for multiple clients
Led content strategy workshops and training sessions

broadcaster.title: Broadcaster & Voice Artist
broadcaster.subtitle: Professional Voice Services
broadcaster.description: Beyond digital marketing, I bring professional broadcasting experience with a warm, engaging voice perfect for commercials, narrations, and corporate presentations.

commercial.title: Commercial Voice-Overs
commercial.description: Engaging voice for advertisements and promotional content

corporate.title: Corporate Narration
corporate.description: Professional narration for training videos and presentations

podcast.title: Podcast Hosting
podcast.description: Dynamic hosting and interviewing for podcast productions

uxui.title: UX/UI Design
uxui.subtitle: User-Centered Design Solutions
uxui.description: Combining creativity with user research to design intuitive and aesthetically pleasing digital experiences that delight users and achieve business goals.

research.title: User Research
research.description: Conducting user interviews, surveys, and usability testing

wireframing.title: Wireframing & Prototyping
wireframing.description: Creating low and high-fidelity prototypes in Figma

systems.title: Design Systems
systems.description: Building consistent and scalable design systems

responsive.title: Responsive Design
responsive.description: Designing for multiple devices and screen sizes

campaign.title: Social Media Campaign
campaign.description: Comprehensive digital campaign that increased brand awareness by 200%

branding.title: Brand Identity Design
branding.description: Complete brand redesign including logo, guidelines, and digital assets

website.title: E-commerce Website
website.description: UX/UI design for online store with 50% conversion rate improvement

cta.title: Let's Create Something Amazing Together
cta.description: Whether you need digital marketing strategy, content creation, or UX/UI design, I'm here to help bring your vision to life. Let's discuss how we can work together to achieve your goals.
